_publications._publicationTitle: MAF mediates crosstalk between Ras-MAPK and mTOR signaling in NF1.

_contextSnippet: we identified 152 probe sets with differential expression ≥ 2.3-fold in MPNST cells expressing the NF1-GRD and not differentially expressed in GFP-expressing cells
details: Identified 152 probe sets with differential expression ≥ 2.3-fold in MPNST cells expressing NF1-GRD, with 128 of 152 probe sets showing gene expression brought closer to normal human Schwann cell levels
